description.Sn: Simpson's Rule estimate (renamed from S, which collides with sympy.S)
description.K: bound on the relevant derivative used in the error bound
description.fm1: the integrand evaluated at the first Midpoint Rule sample point
description.fm2: the integrand evaluated at the second Midpoint Rule sample point
description.fm3: the integrand evaluated at the third Midpoint Rule sample point
description.fm4: the integrand evaluated at the fourth Midpoint Rule sample point

subscript_convention: Use T_n / M_n / S_n and f0, f1, ..., fn for the estimate and the node values at n subintervals; the Midpoint Rule's sample values are fm1, fm2, ...
